case_title: KATS ABRAM et al VS OAK ASSOCIATES REALTORS BUILDERS

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT OAK ASSOCIATES REALTORS BUILDERS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KATS ABRAM KATS VERA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OAK ASSOCIATES REALTORS BUILDERS $235.92 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $243.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO PLTF.ABRAM MAILED TO CORRECT ADDRESS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $730.00 FILED BY KATS ABRAM KATS VERA AS TO DEFENDANT OAK ASSOCIATES REALTORS BUILDERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-20-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO PLTF.ABRAM RETURNED TO US.UNABLE TO FORWARD.
